note: Self-improving loop: improve multicolor pipeline for 20-30 color images; target hw_forest_cat quality.

kept_changes.notes: Lower ΔE merge window = more cluster preservation. Improves synthetic median without regressing forest cat (k=30 layers unchanged; no cluster pairs fall in the narrower 6-8 ΔE gap).

tried.result: synthetic +3.5%; no new forest_cat color families. Option preserved, default kept at 0.

forest_cat_renders.note: Same layout as iter0 — mergeThreshold=6 doesn't change forest_cat clustering (no pairs in the narrower gap)

observations: First kept change after 9 probes across 5 iters: mergeThreshold 8→6 gives -4.6% global median.
Mechanism: narrower merge window preserves more clusters at the over-cluster stage; wins on cells where genuine color pairs were in the 6-8 ΔE gap.
Forest cat: unchanged at k=30. The improvement is synthetic-only; forest cat output is bit-identical to iter0 (same 8273 paths, same unique fills).
Exit criterion status: global improved -4.6%, but the exit criterion watches n30_clean specifically. Need per-cell verification that n30_clean ≥15% drop.
Remaining candidates: mergeThreshold 4, 5, 7 (fine-grain around the new winner); minClusterFraction <<0.0005; combinations with denoiseRadius=2 (conditional on noise).
next_probe: mergeThreshold: 6 → 4 (continue downward to find the floor)
